scores.breadth_rationale: Document covers 23 of 24 relevant taxonomy sections (96%). Only non-functional requirements section is missing, which is intentional - document focuses on functional and technical scope rather than performance/security constraints.
scores.depth_rationale: Of covered sections, 87% receive comprehensive treatment (not just mentioned). Most sections get 200-1000 word explanations with examples, tables, or detailed lists. Only a few sections receive minimal/surface coverage.
scores.unique_content_rationale: Document provides substantial original synthesis: 6 major unique content areas including the reference repository analysis (1200+ words), event type taxonomy (400+ words), and consolidated action items (800 words). Total unique content ~4000 words (~32% of document).

recommendation.reasoning: research-synthesis-v2.md is highly suitable as a master reference document. It achieves 87% overall coverage with comprehensive depth (87% of sections treated thoroughly), covers all critical technical and architectural content from the taxonomy, and adds substantial original synthesis work (6000+ words of unique content including gap analysis, field audits, and consolidated action items). The single missing section (NFRs) is appropriately excluded from this functional/technical synthesis document. Document structure supports rapid navigation via 20 major sections with detailed tables of contents.
strengths: Deep technical treatment: 87% of sections comprehensive vs. superficial
Well-organized: 20 major sections with clear hierarchy and cross-references
Rich with synthesis: 6 distinct areas of original analysis with gap-filling content
High utility: Consolidated action items (40 prioritized tasks) ready for project planning
Reference-complete: Full catalog of 17 repositories with line-of-code analysis
Self-aware: Includes implementation status matrix showing what's built vs. planned
Enterprise-ready: Comprehensive data model documentation with audit trails
minor_gaps: NFRs (non-functional requirements) not covered - but appropriately omitted
Some sections like 21-23 (Roadmap phases, appendices) briefly mentioned but not comprehensively expanded
Master-level recommendations and decision rationale could be slightly more explicit in some sections
next_steps: Designate research-synthesis-v2.md as authoritative reference document
Use consolidated action items section as basis for sprint planning
Reference HF field completeness audit when extending CDM schema
Cross-link product requirements and full project roadmap to this synthesis for traceability
